stories.title: Ethan Quinn Wins Mallorca Championships — First ATP Title for 22-Year-Old American

x_posts.label: Post 1-1
x_posts.text:
Ethan Quinn wins his first ATP title.

The 22-year-old American beat Davidovich Fokina 6-1, 6-2 at Mallorca — utterly dominant.

Three years ago he won the NCAA title at Georgia. Today he's an ATP champion. 🎾 #ATPTour [URL]

x_posts.label: Post 1-2
x_posts.text:
Quinn def. Davidovich Fokina 6-1, 6-2 in the Mallorca final.

He beat Borges 6-1, 6-2 in the SF too. Never reached a QF anywhere before this week.

No. 63 Quinn just had the best week of his life on grass, two days before Wimbledon. 🎾 #ATPTour [URL]

article.headline: Ethan Quinn Wins First ATP Title at Mallorca, Dominating Davidovich Fokina 6-1, 6-2

image_concepts.raw:

stories.title: Muchova Claims Bad Homburg Title After Osaka Retires in First Career Grass Final

x_posts.label: Post 2-1
x_posts.text:
Karolina Muchova wins Bad Homburg.

Naomi Osaka retired in the final trailing 6-1, 1-0 with a right foot injury — just 49 minutes in.

Osaka's first career grass-court final ends in heartbreak. Wimbledon is Monday. 🎾 #WTATennis [URL]

x_posts.label: Post 2-2
x_posts.text:
Osaka reached the first grass-court final of her career this week at Bad Homburg.

She retired trailing Muchova 6-1, 1-0 after a foot injury.

That's Wimbledon health question No. 1 right now. #WTATennis #Wimbledon2026 [URL]

article.headline: Muchova Wins Bad Homburg Title After Osaka Retires with Foot Injury in First Career Grass Final

stories.title: Wimbledon 2026 Faces Record 13 Withdrawals Before Championships Begin Monday

x_posts.label: Post 3
x_posts.text:
Wimbledon 2026 starts Monday with 13 player withdrawals:

Alcaraz, Musetti, Rune (men) — Mboko (No. 9), Vondrousova, Kartal (women).

It's the deepest pre-tournament absence list in years. #Wimbledon2026 [URL]

article.headline: Wimbledon 2026 Faces Record 13 Withdrawals: Alcaraz, Rune, WTA No. 9 Mboko Among the Absentees

image_concepts.label: Image
image_concepts.raw:
Wimbledon 13 Withdrawals

**Social (1080x1350):**
- Search term: `Carlos Alcaraz tennis`
- Credit: (USA TODAY Sports Images)
- Usage: Alcaraz — the highest-profile name on the absence list; his wrist injury is the most-discussed withdrawal

**Article Hero (1200x630):**
- Search term: `Victoria Mboko tennis`
- Credit: (Imagn Images)
- Usage: Mboko in match action — the WTA No. 9's knee injury at Queen's and the end of her doubles run with Serena is the most dramatic women's withdrawal story

stories.title: Eastbourne Finals Saturday — Humbert vs Bergs (Men), Keys vs Maria (Women)

x_posts.label: Post 4
x_posts.text:
Eastbourne finals today — the last Wimbledon warm-up:

🎾 Men's: Humbert vs Bergs (Bergs came back to beat Samuel; Humbert beat Draper)
🎾 Women's: Keys vs Maria (both SFs saw retirements)

Winner collects a title before Monday. #Eastbourne #Wimbledon2026 [URL]

article.headline: Eastbourne 2026 Finals: Humbert Faces Bergs, Keys Meets Maria in Last Grass Warm-Up Before Wimbledon

stories.title: Wimbledon 2026 — Blockbuster Draw Sets Up Fritz vs Draper, Andreeva Hunts Historic Double

x_posts.label: Post 5
x_posts.text:
Wimbledon 2026 starts Monday. Key storylines from the draw:

🎾 Fritz (No. 6) vs Draper — R1 blockbuster
🎾 Andreeva (No. 5) chasing RG/Wimbledon double (not done since Henin in 2006)
🎾 Serena in Swiatek's quarter

#Wimbledon2026 [URL]
